temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A person in a white shirt is violently thrown backward by a powerful, fiery explosion. The force of the blast sends them tumbling across a metal-grated floor, their body contorting as they are flung about by the intense heat and pressure. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a high-stakes, violent event, showing the brutal impact of an explosion on a character.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, booming explosion sound effect dominates the audio, followed by the sound of a body hitting the metal floor.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene abruptly cuts to a dark, underwater environment. A person's head is seen bobbing and struggling in murky, greenish water. Their hair is disheveled, and their face is partially obscured by the darkness and bubbles, conveying a sense of struggle and drowning. (Storyline: This cut introduces a new, perilous situation, suggesting the character is not only injured but is also in immediate danger of drowning.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of muffled, gurgling water is prominent, accompanied by a low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score.)
